  have h_inv (p : ℕ) : C p ^ 2 - 3 * S p ^ 2 = (-2 : ZMod 5) ^ p := by
    induction p with
    | zero => 
      simp [S, C]
      decide
    | succ p ih =>
      obtain ⟨hs, hc⟩ := h_rec p
      rw [hs, hc]
      ring_nf
      rw [ih]
      norm_num
  have h_contra : S m = 0 := by
    convert h using 1
    norm_cast
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro k _
    congr 1
    rw [show 2^3 = 8 by rfl]
    norm_num [ZMod.int_cast_eq_int_cast_iff]
  specialize h_inv m
  rw [h_contra] at h_inv
  simp only [zero_pow (by norm_num : 2 ≠ 0), mul_zero, sub_zero] at h_inv
  have : (-2 : ZMod 5) ^ m = 2 * (-1 : ZMod 5) ^ n := by
    have : m = 2 * n + 1 := rfl
    rw [this, pow_add, pow_mul, show (-2 : ZMod 5) ^ 2 = 4 by rfl, show (4 : ZMod 5) = -1 by rfl, pow_one]
    ring
  rw [this] at h_inv
  -- C m ^ 2 = 2 * (-1)^n.
  -- Squares mod 5 are 0, 1, 4.
  -- If n even, 2 * 1 = 2. Not square.
  -- If n odd, 2 * -1 = -2 = 3. Not square.
  rcases Nat.even_or_odd n with ⟨k, rfl⟩ | ⟨k, rfl⟩
  · simp [pow_mul] at h_inv
    have : (2 : ZMod 5) = C (2 * (2 * k) + 1) ^ 2 := h_inv.symm
    revert this; decide
  · simp [pow_add, pow_mul] at h_inv
    have : (3 : ZMod 5) = C (2 * (2 * k + 1) + 1) ^ 2 := h_inv.symm
    revert this; decide

rw [← ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd (n := 5), not_iff, not_not]
  let a (m : ℕ) : ZMod 5 := ∑ k in Finset.range (m + 1), (m.choose (2 * k + 1)) * 3 ^ k
  let b (m : ℕ) : ZMod 5 := ∑ k in Finset.range (m + 1), (m.choose (2 * k)) * 3 ^ k
  
  have goal_eq : (∑ k in Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) (2 * k + 1) : ZMod 5) * (2^(3 * k))) = a (2 * n + 1) := by
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro k _
    rw [show (2 : ZMod 5) ^ (3 * k) = 3 ^ k by rw [pow_mul]; norm_num]
  rw [goal_eq]

  have step (m : ℕ) : a (m + 1) = a m + b m ∧ b (m + 1) = b m + 3 * a m := by
    let R := Finset.range (m + 2)
    have ha : a m = ∑ k in R, (m.choose (2 * k + 1)) * 3 ^ k := by
      rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]; simp [Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt (by linarith)]
    have hb : b m = ∑ k in R, (m.choose (2 * k)) * 3 ^ k := by
      rw [Finset.sum_range_succ]; simp [Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt (by linarith)]
    constructor
    · rw [ha, hb, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro k _
      rw [← mul_add, ← Nat.cast_add, Nat.add_comm, Nat.choose_succ_eq_add]
    · rw [Finset.sum_range_succ']
      simp only [Nat.choose_zero_right, Nat.cast_one, pow_zero, mul_one, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, add_left_cancel_iff]
      rw [hb, Finset.sum_range_succ']
      simp only [Nat.choose_zero_right, Nat.cast_one, pow_zero, mul_one, add_left_cancel_iff]
      rw [← Finset.mul_sum, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
      apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
      intro k _
      rw [← mul_assoc, ← pow_succ, ← mul_add, ← Nat.cast_add, Nat.add_comm, Nat.choose_succ_eq_add]

  have rec_a (m : ℕ) : a (m + 2) = 2 * a (m + 1) + 2 * a m := by
    have s1 := step m; have s2 := step (m + 1)
    rw [s2.1, s1.2, s1.1, add_comm (b m), eq_sub_of_add_eq s1.1]; ring_nf; norm_num

  have period (k : ℕ) : a (k + 6) = 3 * a k := by
    repeat rw [rec_a]
    ring_nf; norm_num

  have not_zero (k : ℕ) : a k = 0 ↔ k % 6 = 0 := by
    induction k using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h k ih =>
      if h6 : k < 6 then
        match k with
        | 0 => simp [a]
        | 1 => simp [a]; norm_num
        | 2 => rw [rec_a 0]; simp [a]; norm_num
        | 3 => rw [rec_a 1]; simp [a]; norm_num; rw [rec_a 0]; simp [a]; norm_num
        | 4 => rw [rec_a 2, rec_a 0, rec_a 1]; simp [a]; norm_num; rw [rec_a 0]; simp [a]; norm_num
        | 5 => rw [rec_a 3, rec_a 1, rec_a 2, rec_a 0]; simp [a]; norm_num; rw [rec_a 0]; simp [a]; norm_num
      else
        let k' := k - 6
        have : k = k' + 6 := (Nat.sub_add_cancel (le_of_not_lt h6)).symm
        rw [this, period, mul_eq_zero]
        rw [ih k' (by omega), ← Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero]
        constructor <;> intro h <;> [rwa [← this, Nat.dvd_add_iff_left (by norm_num)], rwa [Nat.dvd_add_iff_left (by norm_num)]]

  rw [not_zero]
  intro h
  have : 2 ∣ (2 * n + 1) := DVD.dvd.trans (by norm_num) (Nat.dvd_of_mod_eq_zero h)
  norm_num at this

let S := ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) (2 * k + 1)) * (2^(3 * k))
  rw [← ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd S 5]
  let M : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![1, 3; 1, 1]
  let v (k : ℕ) : Fin 2 → ZMod 5 := M ^ k *ᵥ ![1, 0]
  
  have h_val : (S : ZMod 5) = v (2 * n + 1) 1 := by
    have h_decomp : M = 1 + !![0, 3; 1, 0] := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
    rw [h_decomp, add_pow, Matrix.sum_mulVec]
    simp only [Matrix.nsmul_mulVec, Matrix.one_mulVec, Commute.one_left, one_pow, one_mul]
    
    let A := !![(0 : ZMod 5), 3; 1, 0]
    have hA_odd : ∀ k, (A ^ (2 * k + 1) *ᵥ ![1, 0]) 1 = 3 ^ k := by
      intro k
      induction k with
      | zero => rfl
      | succ k ih => 
        rw [pow_add, pow_mul, show A^2 = (3 : ZMod 5) • (1 : Matrix _ _ _) by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl]
        simp [ih]
    have hA_even : ∀ k, (A ^ (2 * k) *ᵥ ![1, 0]) 1 = 0 := by
      intro k
      rw [pow_mul, show A^2 = (3 : ZMod 5) • (1 : Matrix _ _ _) by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl]
      simp
    
    let f (k : ℕ) := (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) k : ZMod 5) * (A ^ k *ᵥ ![1, 0]) 1
    trans ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), f k
    · rfl
    · rw [← Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter (λ x => x % 2 = 1)]
      simp [f, hA_even]
      convert Finset.sum_bij (λ k _ => 2 * k + 1) (by intro a ha; simp at ha ⊢; omega) (by intro a _ b _ h; omega) (by intro b hb; simp at hb; exists (b-1)/2; simp; omega) (by intro k hk; simp [hA_odd, mul_comm, pow_mul])
      simp [S, mul_comm]
      
  rw [h_val]
  let m := 2 * n + 1
  have h_per : M ^ 6 = (3 : ZMod 5) • (1 : Matrix _ _ _) := by
    have hM2 : M ^ 2 = !![(4 : ZMod 5), 1; 2, 4] := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
    have hM3 : M ^ 3 = !![(0 : ZMod 5), 3; 1, 0] := by rw [pow_succ, hM2]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
    rw [show 6 = 3 * 2 by rfl, pow_mul, hM3]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
  
  have h_rec : ∀ k, v (k + 6) 1 = 3 * v k 1 := by
    intro k
    simp [v, pow_add, h_per, Matrix.smul_mulVec]
  
  have h_nz : v (m % 6) 1 ≠ 0 := by
    have hm_odd : m % 2 = 1 := by dsimp [m]; rw [Nat.add_mod]; simp
    have h_mod : m % 6 ∈ ({1, 3, 5} : Finset ℕ) := by
      have : m % 6 < 6 := Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
      have : (m % 6) % 2 = 1 := by rw [← Nat.mod_mod_of_dvd m (by norm_num : 2 ∣ 6)]; assumption
      interval_cases (m % 6) <;> simp_all
    fin_cases h : m % 6
    · rfl -- 1
    · rfl -- 3
    · rfl -- 5
  
  rw [← Nat.div_add_mod m 6]
  generalize m / 6 = q
  generalize m % 6 = r
  induction q with
  | zero => simp at h_nz ⊢; assumption
  | succ q ih => rw [Nat.succ_mul, ← add_assoc, h_rec]; intro h; apply ih; apply (mul_eq_zero.mp h).resolve_left (by decide)

intro h
  rw [← ZMod.int_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at h
  let A : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![1, 3; 1, 1]
  let v (m : ℕ) := A ^ m *ᵥ ![1, 0]

  have h_recur (m : ℕ) :
      v m 1 = ∑ k in Finset.range (m + 1), (Nat.choose m (2 * k + 1)) * (3 : ZMod 5) ^ k ∧
      v m 0 = ∑ k in Finset.range (m + 1), (Nat.choose m (2 * k)) * (3 : ZMod 5) ^ k := by
    induction m with
    | zero => simp [v, A]; rfl
    | succ m ih =>
      rcases ih with ⟨ihs, ihc⟩
      have hA : v (m + 1) = A *ᵥ v m := by simp [v, pow_succ, Matrix.mul_vec_mul_vec]
      have h_step : v (m + 1) 1 = v m 0 + v m 1 ∧ v (m + 1) 0 = v m 0 + 3 * v m 1 := by
        simp [hA, A, Matrix.mul_vec, dotProduct]; constructor <;> ring
      constructor
      · rw [h_step.1, ihs, ihc, Finset.sum_range_succ_comm, Finset.sum_range_succ_comm]
        simp only [Nat.choose_succ_eq_add, Nat.cast_add, mul_add, Finset.sum_add_distrib]
        ring
      · rw [h_step.2, ihc, ihs, Finset.sum_range_succ', Finset.sum_range_succ']
        simp only [Nat.choose_zero, Nat.cast_one, pow_zero, mul_one, add_left_inj]
        rw [mul_comm (3 : ZMod 5), Finset.mul_sum]
        apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
        intro k _
        rw [Nat.choose_succ_eq_add, Nat.cast_add, mul_add, pow_succ]
        ring

  let m := 2 * n + 1
  have h_val : v m 1 = 0 := by
    convert h using 1
    rw [h_recur m |>.1]
    push_cast
    apply Finset.sum_subset (Finset.range_subset.2 (by linarith))
    · intro k _ hk_rng
      rw [show (2 : ZMod 5) ^ (3 * k) = 3 ^ k by ring]
    · intro k hk_m hk_n
      rw [Finset.mem_range] at hk_m hk_n
      have : m < 2 * k + 1 := by linarith
      rw [Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt this, Nat.cast_zero, zero_mul]

  have hA6 : A ^ 6 = 3 • (1 : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5)) := by decide
  have h_per (k : ℕ) : v (k + 6) = 3 • v k := by
    simp [v, add_comm k, pow_add, hA6, Matrix.mul_vec, Matrix.smul_mul]

  let r := m % 6
  have hm : m = m / 6 * 6 + r := (Nat.div_add_mod m 6).symm
  have hv : v m = (3 : ZMod 5) ^ (m / 6) • v r := by
    nth_rw 1 [hm]; generalize q := m / 6
    induction q with | zero => simp | succ q ih => rw [Nat.succ_mul, ←add_assoc, h_per, ih, mul_smul]

  have h_nz : v r 1 ≠ 0 := by
    have : r % 2 = 1 := by
      have hodd : m % 2 = 1 := by simp [m]
      rw [hm] at hodd; norm_num at hodd; assumption
    have : r < 6 := Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
    interval_cases r
    · have : v 1 1 = 1 := by decide
      rw [this]; exact one_ne_zero
    · have : v 3 1 = 1 := by decide
      rw [this]; exact one_ne_zero
    · have : v 5 1 = 4 := by decide
      rw [this]; exact four_ne_zero
    all_goals (norm_num at this)

  rw [hv] at h_val
  simp at h_val
  exact h_nz h_val

-- Convert to Integer arithmetic and powers of 8
  simp only [pow_mul]
  change ¬ 5 ∣ ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (2 * n + 1).choose (2 * k + 1) * 8 ^ k
  intro h_div
  let N := 2 * n + 1
  let s := ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (N.choose (2 * k + 1) : ℤ) * 8 ^ k
  let c := ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (N.choose (2 * k) : ℤ) * 8 ^ k
  
  -- We establish the identity c^2 - 8s^2 = -7^N using real numbers for convenience
  let r := Real.sqrt 8
  have hr : r ^ 2 = 8 := Real.sq_sqrt (by norm_num)
  
  -- Key algebraic identity: (1+r)^N - (1-r)^N = 2*s*r
  have h_diff : (1 + r) ^ N - (1 - r) ^ N = 2 * s * r := by
    rw [add_pow, sub_eq_add_neg, add_pow]
    simp only [neg_mul_eq_neg_mul, one_mul, neg_add_rev]
    rw [← Finset.sum_sub_distrib]
    -- Terms with even powers cancel, odd powers double
    let f := λ i => (N.choose i : ℝ) * r ^ i - (N.choose i : ℝ) * (-r) ^ i
    have h_odd : ∀ i ∈ Finset.range (N + 1), Odd i → f i = 2 * (N.choose i) * r ^ i := by
      intro i _ h_odd
      simp [f, neg_pow, h_odd.neg_one_pow]
      ring
    have h_even : ∀ i ∈ Finset.range (N + 1), Even i → f i = 0 := by
      intro i _ h_even
      simp [f, neg_pow, h_even.neg_one_pow]
    
    -- Restrict sum to odd indices
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_sum_filter_odd f (Finset.range (N + 1)) h_even]
    rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl h_odd]
    
    -- Map odd indices 2k+1 in range(N+1) to k in range(n+1)
    rw [← Finset.sum_mul]
    let g : ℕ → ℕ := λ k => 2 * k + 1
    have h_bij : ∀ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), g k ∈ Finset.filter Odd (Finset.range (N + 1)) := by
      intro k hk
      simp only [Finset.mem_range] at hk
      simp [g, N]
      constructor
      · linarith
      · use k; ring
      
    rw [Finset.sum_bij g h_bij _ _ _]
    · -- Term equality: 2 * choose * r^(2k+1) = 2 * s * r
      intro k _
      rw [pow_succ, pow_mul, hr, mul_comm (8:ℝ), mul_assoc]
      push_cast
      ring
    · -- Injectivity
      intros a b _ _ h; simp [g] at h; exact h
    · -- Surjectivity
      intros i hi
      simp at hi
      use (i - 1) / 2
      constructor
      · simp [Finset.mem_range]; have := hi.1; linarith
      · simp [g]; have := hi.2; cases' this with k hk; rw [hk]; simp
  
  -- Similarly (1+r)^N + (1-r)^N = 2*c
  have h_sum : (1 + r) ^ N + (1 - r) ^ N = 2 * c := by
    rw [add_pow, sub_eq_add_neg, add_pow, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
    -- Even terms double, odd terms cancel
    let f := λ i => (N.choose i : ℝ) * r ^ i + (N.choose i : ℝ) * (-r) ^ i
    have h_even : ∀ i ∈ Finset.range (N + 1), Even i → f i = 2 * (N.choose i) * r ^ i := by
      intro i _ h_even
      simp [f, neg_pow, h_even.neg_one_pow]; ring
    have h_odd : ∀ i ∈ Finset.range (N + 1), Odd i → f i = 0 := by
      intro i _ h_odd
      simp [f, neg_pow, h_odd.neg_one_pow]

    rw [Finset.sum_eq_sum_filter_even f (Finset.range (N + 1)) h_odd]
    rw [Finset.sum_congr rfl h_even, ← Finset.sum_mul]
    
    let g : ℕ → ℕ := λ k => 2 * k
    rw [Finset.sum_bij g (by intro k hk; simp [g, N, Finset.mem_range] at *; constructor; linarith; use k; rfl) _ _ _]
    · intro k _; rw [pow_mul, hr]; push_cast; ring
    · intros a b _ _ h; simp [g] at h; exact h
    · intros i hi; simp at hi; use i / 2; constructor
      · simp [Finset.mem_range]; have := hi.1; linarith
      · simp [g]; have := hi.2; cases' this with k hk; rw [hk]; simp

  -- Multiply the two identities: 4rcs = ((1+r)^N)^2 - ((1-r)^N)^2
  -- We actually want c^2 - 8s^2
  have h_invariant : (c:ℝ)^2 - 8 * (s:ℝ)^2 = (-7)^N := by
    have h1 : (2 * c + 2 * s * r) * (2 * c - 2 * s * r) = 4 * c^2 - 4 * s^2 * 8 := by ring_nf; rw [hr]; ring
    have h2 : (2 * c + 2 * s * r) = 2 * (1 + r) ^ N := by linarith [h_diff, h_sum]
    have h3 : (2 * c - 2 * s * r) = 2 * (1 - r) ^ N := by linarith [h_diff, h_sum]
    rw [h2, h3] at h1
    rw [← mul_assoc, mul_comm (2:ℝ), mul_assoc, ← mul_assoc, mul_comm (2:ℝ) (2:ℝ), ← mul_pow] at h1
    rw [show (1+r)*(1-r) = 1-8 by ring_nf; rw [hr]; norm_num] at h1
    norm_num at h1
    linarith

  -- Move to ZMod 5
  norm_cast at h_invariant
  have h_mod : (c : ZMod 5)^2 - 3 * (s : ZMod 5)^2 = 2 * (-1 : ZMod 5)^(n+1) := by
    have : ((-7 : ℤ) : ZMod 5) = 3 := by rfl
    have : ((8 : ℤ) : ZMod 5) = 3 := by rfl
    rw [← zmod_cast_sq, ← zmod_cast_sq] at h_invariant
    apply_fun (Int.cast : ℤ → ZMod 5) at h_invariant
    rw [Int.cast_sub, Int.cast_mul, this] at h_invariant
    rw [h_invariant]
    rw [Int.cast_pow, this]
    have : (3 : ZMod 5) = -2 := by rfl
    rw [this, neg_pow, pow_add, pow_one, mul_comm]
    congr
    ring

  -- Analyze Modulo 5
  have h_s0 : (s : ZMod 5) = 0 := by rw [Int.cast_sum]; exact h_div
  rw [h_s0] at h_mod
  simp only [mul_zero, sub_zero] at h_mod
  
  -- Quadratic residues mod 5 are 0, 1, 4. 
  -- RHS is 2 or 3. Contradiction.
  cases' Nat.even_or_odd n with h_even h_odd
  · -- n is even
    rw [neg_one_pow_eq_one_iff_even.mpr (by linarith)] at h_mod
    simp at h_mod
    have : (c : ZMod 5)^2 = 2 := h_mod
    revert this; decide
  · -- n is odd
    rw [neg_one_pow_eq_neg_iff_odd.mpr (by linarith)] at h_mod
    simp at h_mod
    have : (c : ZMod 5)^2 = 3 := h_mod
    revert this; decide

-- Convert divisibility by 5 to equality in ZMod 5
  intro h
  rw [← ZMod.int_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd, Int.cast_sum] at h
  simp only [Int.cast_mul, Int.cast_pow, Int.cast_natCast] at h
  
  -- Define matrices A and B in ZMod 5
  let A : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![1, 3; 1, 1]
  let B : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![0, 3; 1, 0]
  
  -- Key identity: The sum is equal to the (1,0) entry of A^(2n+1)
  have sum_eq_mat : (∑ k in Finset.range (n + 1), ((2 * n + 1).choose (2 * k + 1) : ZMod 5) * 2 ^ (3 * k)) = (A ^ (2 * n + 1)) 1 0 := by
    have hA : A = 1 + B := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
    have hB_pow : ∀ k, B ^ (2 * k) = (3 : ZMod 5) ^ k • (1 : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5)) ∧ 
                       B ^ (2 * k + 1) = (3 : ZMod 5) ^ k • B := by
      intro k
      induction k with
      | zero => simp
      | succ k ih =>
        obtain ⟨ih_even, ih_odd⟩ := ih
        constructor
        · rw [mul_add, pow_add, ih_even, pow_two, Matrix.smul_mul]
          -- B^2 calculation
          have hB2 : B ^ 2 = (3 : ZMod 5) • (1 : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5)) := by
            ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [B, Matrix.mul_apply, Fin.sum_univ_two]
            rfl
          rw [hB2, Matrix.smul_mul_smul, one_mul, mul_comm (3:ZMod 5), pow_succ]
        · rw [mul_add, pow_add, ih_odd, pow_two]
          have hB2 : B ^ 2 = (3 : ZMod 5) • (1 : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5)) := by
            ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [B, Matrix.mul_apply, Fin.sum_univ_two]
            rfl
          rw [Matrix.mul_smul, hB2, Matrix.smul_mul_smul, mul_one, mul_comm (3:ZMod 5), pow_succ]
          
    rw [hA, add_pow]
    let m := 2 * n + 1
    -- Map sum to matrix entries
    rw [Finset.sum_range_succ_comm] -- ensures range covers all non-zero terms
    have : ∀ k, ((m.choose k : ZMod 5) • B ^ k) 1 0 = 
        if k % 2 = 1 then (m.choose k : ZMod 5) * 3 ^ (k / 2) else 0 := by
      intro k
      rcases Nat.mod_two_eq_zero_or_one k with hk | hk
      · obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_two_mul_of_div_two_eq_zero hk
        rw [hB_pow j |>.1, if_neg (by simp), Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.one_apply_ne]
        simp
      · obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_odd hk
        rw [hB_pow j |>.2, if_pos (by simp), Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.smul_apply]
        simp [B, mul_pow]
        norm_num
        
    rw [Matrix.sum_apply]
    -- Align the sum indices
    trans ∑ k in Finset.range (m + 1), if k % 2 = 1 then (m.choose k : ZMod 5) * 3 ^ (k / 2) else 0
    · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro k _; exact this k
    · rw [← Finset.sum_filter]
      -- Transform filter odd k to sum over 2k+1
      -- We want to show this matches the original sum
      -- Note 2^(3k) = 8^k = 3^k in ZMod 5
      convert (Finset.sum_bij (fun k _ => 2 * k + 1) _ _ _ _).symm
      · intros; simp [m]; linarith
      · intros; rfl
      · intro x hx; simp at hx; simp [hx, Nat.mod_two_eq_one_iff_odd]
      · intro b hb
        simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range] at hb
        refine ⟨(b - 1) / 2, ?_, ?_⟩
        · simp only [Finset.mem_range]; omega
        · have : b % 2 = 1 := by rw [Nat.mod_two_eq_one_iff_odd]; exact hb.2
          omega
      · simp only [show (8 : ZMod 5) = 3 by rfl]; funext k; congr
        
  -- Check periodicity of A
  have h_period : ∀ k, (A ^ (k + 6)) 1 0 = 3 * (A ^ k) 1 0 := by
    intro k
    have A6 : A ^ 6 = 3 • (1 : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5)) := by
      -- Computation of A^6
      native_decide
    rw [pow_add, A6, Matrix.smul_mul, Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.one_apply, Matrix.mul_apply]
    simp [Fin.sum_univ_two]
  
  -- The function f k = (A^k) 1 0 is zero iff k is divisible by 6
  rw [sum_eq_mat] at h
  
  let f (k : ℕ) := (A ^ k) 1 0
  have f_zero_iff : ∀ k, f k = 0 ↔ k % 6 = 0 := by
    intro k
    induction k using Nat.strong_induction_on with
    | h k ih => 
      if hk : k < 6 then
        -- check base cases
        interval_cases k <;> native_decide
      else
        rw [Nat.not_lt] at hk
        let j := k - 6
        have hj : k = j + 6 := (Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add hk).mp rfl
        rw [hj, Nat.add_mod_right, ← ih j (Nat.sub_lt_self (by linarith) (by linarith))]
        simp [f, h_period]
        cases (3 : ZMod 5).isUnit_iff.mp (by native_decide) with | _ u hu =>
          rw [← hu]; simp
  
  -- Final contradiction
  have h_div : (2 * n + 1) % 6 = 0 := (f_zero_iff _).mp h
  have h_odd : (2 * n + 1) % 2 = 1 := Nat.odd_iff.mp (Nat.odd_two_mul_add_one n)
  have h_even_of_div6 : (2 * n + 1) % 2 = 0 := by
    rw [← Nat.mod_mod_of_dvd (2 * n + 1) (by norm_num : 2 ∣ 6), h_div]; rfl
  rw [h_odd] at h_even_of_div6
  contradiction

rw [← ZMod.int_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd]
  let M : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![1, 3; 1, 1]
  -- Matrix powers periodicity
  have hM_pow (k : ℕ) : (M ^ k) 1 0 = 0 ↔ k % 6 = 0 := by
    have hM6 : M ^ 6 = 3 • 1 := by
      rw [show M ^ 6 = (M ^ 2) ^ 3 by group, show M ^ 2 = !![4, 1; 2, 4] by decide]
      decide
    let r := k % 6
    have hk : M ^ k = 3 ^ (k / 6) • M ^ r := by
      nth_rw 1 [← Nat.div_add_mod k 6]
      rw [pow_add, pow_mul, hM6, smul_pow, one_pow, mul_one]
    rw [hk, Matrix.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul, mul_eq_zero]
    simp only [isUnit_iff_ne_zero, isUnit_pow_iff, Ne, not_false_iff, true_or]
    have hr : r < 6 := Nat.mod_lt k (by norm_num)
    interval_cases r <;> { simp; decide }
  -- Link sum to matrix entry
  have h_sum : (M ^ (2 * n + 1)) 1 0 = ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), (Nat.choose (2 * n + 1) (2 * k + 1) : ZMod 5) * 3 ^ k := by
    let ω : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![0, 3; 1, 0]
    have hw : M = 1 + ω := by decide
    have hw2 : ω ^ 2 = 3 • 1 := by decide
    rw [hw, add_pow_of_commute _ _ (Commute.one_left _)]
    simp only [Matrix.sum_apply, Matrix.one_mul]
    rw [Finset.sum_range_split_even_odd]
    have heven (k : ℕ) : (ω ^ (2 * k)) 1 0 = 0 := by rw [pow_mul, hw2]; simp
    have hodd (k : ℕ) : (ω ^ (2 * k + 1)) 1 0 = 3 ^ k := by 
       rw [pow_succ', pow_mul, hw2]; simp; decide
    simp only [heven, mul_zero, Finset.sum_const_zero, zero_add, hodd]
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_sum_diff _ (Finset.range_subset.2 (Nat.le_succ _))]
    rw [Finset.sum_eq_zero, add_zero]
    · apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro k _; norm_cast
    · intro x hx; simp at hx
      rw [Nat.choose_eq_zero_of_lt (by linarith), Nat.cast_zero, zero_mul]
  -- Conclusion
  rw [← h_sum, hM_pow]
  intro h
  have : (2 * n + 1) % 2 = 0 := by
    rw [Nat.dvd_iff_mod_eq_zero] at h
    rw [← Nat.mod_mod_of_dvd (2 * n + 1) (by norm_num : 2 ∣ 6), h]
    rfl
  simp at this

intro h
  let m := 2 * n + 1
  -- Map sum to ZMod 5
  let S := ∑ k ∈ range (n + 1), (m.choose (2 * k + 1) : ZMod 5) * 3 ^ k
  have hS_zero : S = 0 := by
    rw [← ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at h
    convert h using 1; push_cast; apply sum_congr rfl fun k _ ↦ ?_
    rw [show (2 : ZMod 5)^3 = 3 by rfl, pow_mul]

  -- Matrix formulation
  let M : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![1, 3; 1, 1]
  let X : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![0, 3; 1, 0]
  have hM : M = 1 + X := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
  have hX2 : X ^ 2 = 3 • (1 : Matrix _ _ _) := by
    ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [X, Matrix.mul_apply, Fin.sum_univ_two] <;> rfl
  
  -- S corresponds to the (1,0) entry of M^m
  have h_val : (M ^ m) 1 0 = S := by
    rw [hM, add_pow_of_commute 1 X (commute_one_left X) m]
    simp only [one_pow, mul_one, Matrix.sum_apply, Matrix.nsmul_apply, Matrix.one_apply]
    rw [← Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not (range (m + 1)) (Odd)]
    simp only [Finset.filter_not, ← Nat.even_iff_not_odd]
    have odd_term : ∀ k ∈ (range (m + 1)).filter Odd,
      (m.choose k : ZMod 5) * (X ^ k) 1 0 = (m.choose k : ZMod 5) * 3^(k/2) := by
      intro k hk; rw [mem_filter] at hk
      obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_odd hk.2
      have : X ^ (2 * j + 1) = (3 : ZMod 5) ^ j • X := by
        rw [pow_add, pow_mul, hX2, one_mul, nsmul_eq_mul, pow_succ]
        induction j <;> simp [*, pow_succ, mul_assoc]
      rw [this, Matrix.smul_apply, show X 1 0 = 1 by rfl, mul_one]
      congr; simp [Nat.add_div_right]
    have even_term : ∀ k ∈ (range (m + 1)).filter Even, (X ^ k) 1 0 = 0 := by
      intro k hk; rw [mem_filter] at hk
      obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_mul_left_of_even hk.2
      rw [pow_mul, hX2]; simp [nsmul_eq_mul, Matrix.one_apply]
    rw [sum_congr rfl odd_term, sum_eq_zero even_term, add_zero]
    let g : ℕ ↪ ℕ := ⟨λ j => 2 * j + 1, λ _ _ => by linarith⟩
    refine Eq.trans ?_ (sum_map (range (n+1)) g (λ k => (m.choose k : ZMod 5) * 3^(k/2))).symm
    apply sum_congr _ (fun j _ => by simp [g]); ext x
    simp only [mem_filter, mem_range, m, Nat.odd_iff_not_even, Nat.not_even_iff_odd]
    constructor
    · rintro ⟨h1, h2⟩; obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := Nat.exists_eq_add_of_odd h2
      use j; constructor; linarith; rfl
    · rintro ⟨j, hj, rfl⟩; constructor; linarith; simp

  -- Powers of M
  have M3 : M ^ 3 = X := by
    rw [hM]; have : (1+X)^2 = 4 • 1 + 2 • X := by
      rw [add_pow_two, hX2]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp <;> rfl
    rw [pow_succ, this]; simp [hX2, add_mul, mul_add]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
  have M6 : M ^ 6 = 3 • (1 : Matrix _ _ _) := by
    rw [show 6 = 3 * 2 by rfl, pow_mul, M3, hX2]

  -- Periodicity of (M^m) 1 0
  have never_zero : ∀ k, (M ^ (2 * k + 1)) 1 0 ≠ 0 := by
    intro k
    induction' k using Nat.strong_induction_on with k ih
    rcases lt_trichotomy k 3 with h | rfl | h
    · interval_cases k
      · simp [hM, X]
      · rw [show 2 * 1 + 1 = 3 by rfl, M3]; rfl
      · rw [show 2 * 2 + 1 = 5 by rfl, show 5 = 2 + 3 by rfl, pow_add, M3]
        have M2 : M^2 = 4 • 1 + 2 • X := by
          rw [hM, add_pow_two, hX2]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp <;> rfl
        rw [M2]; simp [hX2]; rfl
    · norm_num at h
      let k' := k - 3
      have eq : k = k' + 3 := (Nat.sub_eq_iff_eq_add h).mp rfl
      rw [eq, mul_add, add_assoc, pow_add, M6, Matrix.smul_mul, Matrix.one_mul, Matrix.smul_apply]
      simp [ih k' (by lia)]
  
  exact never_zero n (h_val.trans hS_zero)

intro h
  let M : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![1, 3; 1, 1]
  let Ω : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![0, 3; 1, 0]
  have hM : M = 1 + Ω := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
  have hΩ2 : Ω ^ 2 = (3 : ZMod 5) • (1 : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5)) := by
    ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp <;> rfl
  have h_sum : (M ^ (2 * n + 1)) 1 0 = ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (n + 1), ((2 * n + 1).choose (2 * k + 1) : ZMod 5) * 3 ^ k := by
    rw [hM, add_pow]
    swap; exact Commute.one_left Ω
    simp only [Matrix.sum_apply, Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.mul_one, Matrix.one_apply_ne]
    let f (k : ℕ) := ((2 * n + 1).choose k : ZMod 5) * (Ω ^ k) 1 0
    trans ∑ k ∈ Finset.range (2 * n + 2), f k
    . apply Finset.sum_congr rfl; intro k _; rfl
    rw [←Finset.sum_filter_add_sum_filter_not (Odd ·), Finset.sum_filter_not]
    have h_even : ∀ k, Even k → f k = 0 := by
      intro k hk; obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := hk
      simp [f, pow_mul, hΩ2]
      rw [Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.one_apply_ne]; simp
    have h_odd : ∀ k, Odd k → f k = ((2*n+1).choose k : ZMod 5) * 3^((k-1)/2) := by
      intro k hk; obtain ⟨j, rfl⟩ := hk
      simp [f]
      have : Ω ^ (2 * j + 1) = (3 : ZMod 5) ^ j • Ω := by
         rw [pow_add, pow_mul, hΩ2, smul_pow, one_pow, pow_one, Matrix.smul_mul, Matrix.one_mul]
      rw [this, Matrix.smul_apply]; simp
    simp only [h_even, Finset.sum_const_zero, add_zero, Even]
    rw [Finset.sum_filter, ←Finset.sum_bij (fun k _ ↦ 2 * k + 1)]
    . intro k hk; simp; rw [h_odd _ (by use k)]; congr; norm_cast
      rw [Nat.add_sub_cancel, Nat.mul_div_right _ (by norm_num)]
    . intro k hk; simp at hk ⊢; linarith
    . intro x hx; simp at hx ⊢; exact hx.2
    . intro x y _ _ h; linarith
  have h_val_nz : (M ^ (2 * n + 1)) 1 0 ≠ 0 := by
    let Q := M ^ 2
    have hQ : Q = !![4, 1; 2, 4] := by rw [pow_two]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp <;> rfl
    have hQ3 : Q ^ 3 = 3 • 1 := by rw [pow_three, hQ]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp <;> rfl
    rw [pow_succ', pow_mul, ←hQ]
    obtain ⟨q, r, hr, hqn⟩ := Nat.div_add_mod n 3
    rw [hqn, pow_add, pow_mul, hQ3, smul_pow, one_pow, Matrix.mul_smul, Matrix.smul_apply, mul_eq_zero]
    push_neg; constructor
    . apply pow_ne_zero; norm_num
    . interval_cases r <;> rw [hQ] <;> simp <;> rfl
      . simp; rfl
  rw [h_sum] at h_val_nz
  apply h_val_nz
  rw [←ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_eq_zero_iff_dvd] at h
  norm_cast at h ⊢; rw [h]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro k _
  congr 1
  norm_cast
  rw [show (2 : ZMod 5) ^ (3 * k) = 3 ^ k by ring]

intro h
  let N := 2 * n + 1
  let s := ∑ k ∈ range (n + 1), (N.choose (2 * k + 1)) * 2 ^ (3 * k)
  have h5 : s % 5 = 0 := Nat.mod_eq_zero_of_dvd h
  
  -- We work in ZMod 5 with 2x2 matrices
  let M : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![1, 3; 1, 1]
  
  -- Step 1: Establish the link between the sum s and M^N
  -- We claim s ≡ (M^N)_{1,0} (mod 5)
  have h_val : (M ^ N) 1 0 = (s : ZMod 5) := by
    let U : Matrix (Fin 2) (Fin 2) (ZMod 5) := !![0, 3; 1, 0]
    have hM : M = 1 + U := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
    have hU2 : U ^ 2 = 3 • 1 := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [U, Matrix.mul_apply] <;> rfl
    
    rw [hM, add_pow]
    simp only [Matrix.sum_apply, Matrix.smul_apply, Matrix.pow_apply]
    
    -- Evaluate U^j for term j
    have u_pow (j : ℕ) : (U ^ j) 1 0 = if j % 2 = 1 then 3 ^ (j / 2) else 0 := by
      induction j using Nat.strong_induction_on with | h j ih =>
      match j with
      | 0 => simp
      | 1 => simp [U]
      | j+2 =>
        rw [pow_add, hU2, Matrix.mul_eq_mul, Matrix.smul_mul, Matrix.one_mul, Matrix.smul_apply]
        rw [ih j (lt_add_of_pos_right _ (by norm_num))]
        simp only [Nat.add_mod_right, Nat.add_div_right _ (by norm_num)]
        split_ifs <;> simp [mul_comm]

    -- Match the binomial sum
    rw [←Finset.sum_filter]
    let g (k : ℕ) := 2 * k + 1
    rw [Finset.sum_bij' (fun k _ => g k) _ (fun j _ => j / 2) _ _ _]
    · intro k hk
      simp only [g]
      rw [u_pow]
      have h_odd : (2 * k + 1) % 2 = 1 := by simp
      rw [if_pos h_odd]
      congr 1
      · congr 1
      · simp [Nat.add_div_right]
        have : (8 : ZMod 5) = 3 := rfl
        rw [←this, ←pow_mul]
        ring
    · intro k hk
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range] at hk ⊢
      constructor
      · rw [g, N]; linarith
      · simp [g]
    · intro j hj
      simp only [Finset.mem_filter, Finset.mem_range] at hj
      simp only [Finset.mem_range]
      rw [Nat.mod_eq_one_iff_odd] at hj
      apply Nat.div_lt_of_lt_mul
      rw [mul_comm]
      exact lt_of_le_of_lt (Nat.le_of_lt_succ hj.1) (by rw [N]; linarith)
    · intro k hk; simp [g]
    · intro j hj
      simp at hj
      rw [Nat.mod_eq_one_iff_odd] at hj
      exact Nat.div_add_mod' j 2 ▸ (hj.2 ▸ rfl : 2 * (j / 2) + 1 = j)

  -- Step 2: Show (M^N)_{1,0} ≠ 0 by periodicity
  have h_nz : (M ^ N) 1 0 ≠ 0 := by
    have M6 : M ^ 6 = 3 • 1 := by 
       have M3 : M ^ 3 = !![0, 3; 1, 0] := by 
         norm_num [M, Matrix.mul_apply]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> rfl
       rw [show 6 = 3 + 3 by rfl, pow_add, M3]
       ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp <;> rfl

    let r := N % 6
    have hr : r < 6 := Nat.mod_lt _ (by norm_num)
    have hN_decomp : M ^ N = (M ^ 6) ^ (N / 6) * M ^ r := by 
      rw [←pow_mul, ←pow_add, Nat.div_add_mod]
    rw [hN_decomp, M6, Matrix.smul_pow, Matrix.one_pow, Matrix.smul_mul, Matrix.one_mul, Matrix.smul_apply]
    intro h0
    
    cases (mul_eq_zero.mp h0) with
    | inl h => apply IsUnit.ne_zero (IsUnit.pow (N/6) (by apply IsUnit.mk0; norm_num)) h
    | inr h =>
       have h_odd : r % 2 = 1 := by
         have : N % 2 = 1 := by rw [N]; simp
         rw [←Nat.mod_mod_of_dvd N (by norm_num : 2 ∣ 6)] at this
         assumption
       interval_cases r
       · norm_num at h_odd
       · norm_num [M] at h
       · norm_num at h_odd
       · have : M ^ 3 = !![0, 3; 1, 0] := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [M] <;> rfl
         rw [this] at h; norm_num at h
       · norm_num at h_odd
       · have : M ^ 5 = !![1, 2; 4, 1] := by 
           have M2 : M^2 = !![4, 1; 2, 4] := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [M] <;> rfl
           have M3 : M^3 = !![0, 3; 1, 0] := by ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp [M] <;> rfl
           rw [show 5=2+3 by rfl, pow_add, M2, M3]; ext i j; fin_cases i <;> fin_cases j <;> simp <;> rfl
         rw [this] at h; norm_num at h

  -- Step 3: Contradiction
  rw [h_val] at h_nz
  have : (s : ZMod 5) = 0 := by rw [ZMod.nat_cast_zmod_val, h5]; rfl
  exact h_nz this
